reasoning: Liu Zige has held the 200m butterfly supersuit world record since 2009. While Summer McIntosh came within 0.18s of breaking it in July 2025, she typically peaks for summer meets and the November–February period is predominantly short course season or mid-season long course training (where swimmers are rarely fully tapered). It is extremely rare for supersuit long course records to be broken during winter months. Therefore, the probability that the record stands through November, December, and February is very high, decreasing only slightly over time due to the possibility of exceptional mid-season performances at meets like the U.S. Open or Pro Swim Series.
